description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on one side, allowing for abundant natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The house is surrounded by a manicured green lawn with several palm trees, enhancing its contemporary aesthetic. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, and a spacious patio area with outdoor seating. The main entryway is marked by a simple, flush door and a paved walkway leading up to it. The overall structure is characterized by white and gray walls, black window frames, and minimalist landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring palm trees and a green lawn.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the open roof layout, large glass windows, and the outdoor patio area with seating.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear or side of the house, emphasizing the solid white walls, smaller windows, and the surrounding lawn with palm trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house, featuring the main entryway, a paved walkway, and a balanced arrangement of windows.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the opposite side, showcasing the flat roof, a mix of large and small windows, and the glass-enclosed section of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with a paved walkway, no porch or overhang, minimalistic and unadorned
